pages.text: RESTRICTED — PROSECUTION DISCLOSURE BUNDLE URN: 26/DA/019 Defendant: Ryan Marsh Court: Northgate Traffic Court === SECTION: COVER_INDEX === INDEX Document | Pages | Note Charge sheet | 1 | MG5 case summary | 2-3 | MG6C disclosure schedule | 4 | Officer MG11 | 5 | Breath/device procedure summary | 6 | Court listing | 7 | === SECTION: CHARGE === R v Ryan Marsh Statement of Offence: Drive motor vehicle with alcohol concentration above limit, contrary to section 5(1)(a) of the Road Traffic Act  1988. Particulars of Offence: On 6 June 2026 at Northgate Traffic drove a motor vehicle on a road after consuming alcohol in excess of the  prescribed limit.

pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === MG05 — OFFENCE REPORT URN: 26/DA/019 Officer in case: PC Vale 8831

pages.label: MG5 (2/2)
pages.text: === SECTION: MG5 === Headline Summary Breath procedure summary served. Device calibration, full intoxilyser record, and CCTV/dashcam export are  outstanding.

pages.label: MG6C schedule
pages.text: === SECTION: MG6 === MG6C — UNUSED MATERIAL SCHEDULE MG6C/MOT/01 — Officer MG11 — served. MG6C/MOT/02 — Breath/device procedure summary — served (summary only). MG6C/MOT/03 — Device calibration certificate — outstanding. MG6C/MOT/04 — Full intoxilyser record — outstanding. MG6C/MOT/05 — CCTV/dashcam export — referred — not attached. MG6C/MOT/06 — Collision/medical expert — outstanding if relied upon.

pages.label: Officer MG11
pages.text: === SECTION: MG11 === MG11 — OFFICER STATEMENT (PC Vale 8831) 1. I conducted a roadside breath test and station procedure. 2. Procedure summary is served. Full device calibration and native export records are NOT on bundle.

pages.label: Breath/device procedure summary
pages.text: === SECTION: BREATH_PROCEDURE === BREATH / DEVICE PROCEDURE SUMMARY (served extract only) Device: Intoxilyser reference on summary Result on summary: 42 μg/100ml breath (summary page only) Calibration certificate: outstanding MG6C/MOT/03 Full intoxilyser record: outstanding MG6C/MOT/04

pages.label: Listing
pages.text: === SECTION: LISTING === Single justice procedure / first hearing — 14 July 2026, Northgate Traffic Court.
